EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for leads at the first attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Opportunity – 1st Attempt
EmailTemplate.subject: Can I help you with your Quotation?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for getting an insurance quote from Kingsbridge.
I wanted to get in touch to see if you have any questions or queries regarding the quote?
If you are interested in proceeding with your purchase, just reply with the best date and time for me to call you. Alternatively, you can give me a ring on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
